title: Schemable Validator meta-schema
description: Extends JSON Schema draft 2020-12 with the schemable-validator owned extensions (x-transform, x-when, x-custom-fields, x-unmapped-fields, errorMessage). Use this as $schema so IDEs and tools recognize the extension keywords without unknown-property warnings.

jsonLogicCondition.description: A JSONLogic condition object. Supported operators: ===, !==, >=, <=, >, <, and, or. Values: scalars or {"var": "fieldName"} references.

require.description: Fields that become required when the condition matches.

transformCatalog.description: Closed catalog of ASCII-safe value transforms applied before validation.

errorMessageMap.description: Inline error messages keyed by JSON Schema keyword (AJV ajv-errors convention). Values may contain {var} / {var, type} ICU-subset placeholders.

schemablePropertyExtensions.description: Extensions available on each property inside 'properties'.

x-transform.description: Value transforms applied before validation in declared order.

x-when.description: Conditional requirements evaluated via JSONLogic after per-field validation.

x-custom-fields.description: Server-side custom validation fields with no JSON Schema form. FE warns when .refine() is not registered.

x-unmapped-fields.description: Fields validated server-side only (FileSchema, escape hatches). FE passes through.
